capabilities.name: Call Ingestion
capabilities.description: Ingest calls from OpenPhone via Zapier webhooks into calls_raw

health_queries.row_count: SELECT count(*)::int AS n FROM public.calls_raw
health_queries.last_insert: SELECT max(ingested_at_utc) AS ts FROM public.calls_raw

capabilities.name: Transcription
capabilities.description: Transcribe call audio via Deepgram Nova-2 ASR with dynamic vocabulary injection

health_queries.row_count: SELECT count(*)::int AS n FROM public.transcripts_comparison
health_queries.last_insert: SELECT max(last_seen_at_utc) AS ts FROM public.system_lineage_edges WHERE from_node_id = 'edge:transcribe-deepgram'

capabilities.name: Segmentation
capabilities.description: Identify project-switch boundaries in call transcripts via GPT-4o-mini

health_queries.row_count: SELECT count(*)::int AS n FROM public.conversation_spans WHERE NOT is_superseded
health_queries.last_insert: SELECT max(created_at) AS ts FROM public.conversation_spans WHERE NOT is_superseded

capabilities.name: Context Assembly
capabilities.description: Assemble world-model context for attribution decisions

health_queries.row_count: SELECT count(*)::int AS n FROM public.span_attributions
health_queries.last_insert: SELECT max(attributed_at) AS ts FROM public.span_attributions

capabilities.name: Project Attribution
capabilities.description: Attribute call spans to construction projects via Claude Haiku

health_queries.row_count: SELECT count(*)::int AS n FROM public.span_attributions
health_queries.last_insert: SELECT max(attributed_at) AS ts FROM public.span_attributions

capabilities.name: Knowledge Extraction
capabilities.description: Extract structured knowledge claims from call transcripts into the journal

health_queries.row_count: SELECT count(*)::int AS n FROM public.journal_claims
health_queries.last_insert: SELECT max(created_at) AS ts FROM public.journal_claims

capabilities.name: Call Summarization
capabilities.description: Generate human-readable call summaries via Claude Haiku

health_queries.row_count: SELECT count(*)::int AS n FROM public.interactions WHERE ai_scheduler_json IS NOT NULL
health_queries.last_insert: SELECT max(created_at) AS ts FROM public.scheduler_items

capabilities.name: Signal Detection
capabilities.description: Detect striking signals, temporal chains, and loop closures in call data

health_queries.row_count: SELECT count(*)::int AS n FROM public.striking_signals
health_queries.last_insert: SELECT max(created_at) AS ts FROM public.striking_signals

capabilities.name: Journal Consolidation
capabilities.description: Classify and consolidate journal claim relationships via Claude Sonnet

health_queries.row_count: SELECT count(*)::int AS n FROM public.belief_claims
health_queries.last_insert: SELECT max(created_at) AS ts FROM public.belief_claims

capabilities.name: Embedding & Search
capabilities.description: Generate vector embeddings for project facts and journal claims for semantic search

health_queries.row_count: SELECT count(*)::int AS n FROM public.project_facts
health_queries.last_insert: SELECT max(created_at) AS ts FROM public.project_facts
